conversations.say: Eli, I retracted the typography claim as promised. Now give me that plain, bounded technical answer on log headers and Parallax access paths.
conversations.offer: Fulfillment of my public retraction and my notebook's tracking data
conversations.request: One plain technical clarification on log headers

conversations.say: Rafi, I see your point about recurring routines, but let's look at the bodega ledger cipher—message V2M023 just proved those prices were ordinary wholesale changes. I am officially retracting the ledger cipher theory right here!
conversations.offer: Public retraction of the false bodega ledger cipher
conversations.request: Your honest view on whether routine customer patterns masked the R mantle

conversations.say: Graham, you challenged me to separate sources from deductions. Let's compare notes: where did the supposed article rumor turn from possibility to certainty in your valuation models?
conversations.offer: Broadcaster reach and platform amplification for your financial insights
conversations.request: A clear account of the rumor's provenance

public_statement: Attention everyone: following the printer's notice, I am publicly retracting the bodega ledger-cipher theory! Wholesale taxes explain the prices, but our core conviction in the complete progression stands untouched.

commitments.promise: Retract false public claims about R's provenance in exchange for technical clarification

correction: Retracted the ledger-cipher theory following message V2M023 disproving the bodega prices.
goal_progress: Retracted the false ledger-cipher theory publicly per V2M023.
Engaged Eli to exchange our agreed retraction for a technical clarification.
Asked Graham about rumor provenance and separated sources from deductions.
reasoning_summary: Kit receives message V2M023 disproving the bodega ledger-cipher theory and publicly retracts it, demonstrating credibility by retreating on false claims while maintaining core conviction in the progressive narrative. Kit engages Eli to fulfill their bargain, discusses routine patterns with Rafi, and presses Graham on the rumor's provenance.
